rules.name: Court_Bezirksgericht
rules.description: Matches District Courts, stopping at whitespace or punctuation.

rules.name: Court_Landesgericht
rules.description: Matches Regional Courts (Landesgericht) and its abbreviation LG, ensuring it captures the full location including 'für [Location]' patterns but stops before dates or 'vom'.

rules.name: Specific_Org_OkurAutomotive
rules.description: Matches Okur Automotive specifically (without KG suffix to avoid over-matching).

rules.name: Specific_Org_CelikkanatGarten
rules.description: Matches Celikkanat Garten specifically (without KG suffix to avoid over-matching).

rules.name: Specific_Org_LubomirMerschmeyer
rules.description: Matches Lubomir Merschmeyer specifically (as organization in this context).

rules.name: Specific_Org_KubzykElektro
rules.description: Matches /Kubzyk Elektro AG specifically to handle the leading slash.

rules.name: Org_Raiffeisenbank_Karnische
rules.description: Matches the specific multi-line bank name Raiffeisenbank Karnische Rion Bankstelle St.Stefan.

rules.name: Specific_Org_TschurtschenthalerWalderFister
rules.description: Matches Tschurtschenthaler, Walder, Fister Rechtsanwälte GmbH

rules.name: General_Org_GmbH
rules.description: Matches company names ending in GMBH, ensuring the full name is captured by requiring a preceding capitalized word, excluding court/tax terms.

rules.name: General_Org_KG
rules.description: Matches company names ending in KG, excluding common preceding nouns like Arbeitgeber, Firma, Fa.

rules.name: Org_Bundesministers_Arbeit
rules.description: Matches Bundesministers für Arbeit, Soziales und Konsumentenschutz.

rules.name: Specific_Org_Wirtschaftsuniversitaet_Wien
rules.description: Matches Wirtschaftsuniversität Wien and its variations including the parenthetical abbreviation (WU Wien).

rules.name: Specific_Org_Johannes_Kepler_Universitaet_Linz
rules.description: Matches Johannes Kepler Universität Linz and its variations including the parenthetical abbreviation (JKU Linz).

rules.name: Specific_Org_WU
rules.description: Matches WU as an abbreviation for Wirtschaftsuniversität Wien.

rules.name: Specific_Org_JKU
rules.description: Matches JKU as an abbreviation for Johannes Kepler Universität Linz.

rules.name: Specific_Org_HLFTourismus
rules.description: Matches Höhere Lehranstalt für Tourismus, Eventmanagement, Sport und Freizeit and its abbreviation HLF.

rules.name: Specific_Org_Garanta_VersicherungsAG
rules.description: Matches Garanta VersicherungsAG (no space before AG).

rules.name: Specific_Org_Sivananda
rules.description: Matches The International Sivananda Yoga Vedanta Centre.

rules.name: Specific_Org_Kings_School
rules.description: Matches King's School and variations including location suffixes.

rules.name: Specific_Org_England
rules.description: Matches England as an organization in this context.

rules.name: Specific_Org_Hallas_Partner
rules.description: Matches Hallas & Partner Wirtschaftsprüfung und Steuerberatung GmbH & Co KG, handling newlines.

rules.name: Specific_Org_LeitnerLeitner
rules.description: Matches LeitnerLeitner GmbH Wirtschaftsprüfer und Steuerberater.

rules.name: Specific_Org_BDO_Austria
rules.description: Matches BDO Austria GmbH WP- u. StBges.

rules.name: Specific_Org_X_GmbH
rules.description: Matches X GmbH specifically to handle single-letter company names.

rules.name: Specific_Org_Verfassungsgerichtshof
rules.description: Matches Verfassungsgerichtshof (full name) and its genitive form Verfassungsgerichtshofes.

rules.name: Specific_Org_LondonFilmAcademy
rules.description: Matches London Film Academy and common typo London Film Acadamy.

rules.name: Specific_Org_Bundeskanzleramt
rules.description: Matches Bundeskanzleramt and its genitive form Bundeskanzleramtes.

rules.name: Specific_Org_Retail_Chains
rules.description: Matches specific retail organizations: Mur Alver OG, Ikea, Obi, Leiner, Möbelix, MömaX, Otto.de, xxxLutz, Quelle.at.

rules.description: Matches Anwälte Mandl & Mitterbauer GmbH specifically.

rules.name: Specific_Org_Verwaltungsgerichtshof
rules.description: Matches Verwaltungsgerichtshof and its genitive form Verwaltungsgerichtshofes.

rules.name: Specific_Org_SeneCura_Laurentius_Park
rules.description: Matches SeneCura Laurentius Park (without Bludenz) with flexible spacing.

rules.name: Specific_Org_SeneCura_Laurentius_Park_Bludenz
rules.description: Matches SeneCura Laurentius Park Bludenz with flexible spacing.

rules.name: Specific_Org_SENECURA
rules.description: Matches SeneCura, SENECURA, Senecura, but NOT if followed by Laurentius Park.

rules.name: Specific_Org_SaxingerChalupsky
rules.description: Matches Saxinger Chalupsky & Partner Rechtsanwälte GmbH specifically.

rules.name: General_Org_AG
rules.description: Matches company names ending in AG, ensuring the full name is captured by requiring a preceding capitalized word, excluding court/tax terms.

rules.name: Specific_Org_TAXCOACH
rules.description: Matches TAXCOACH Wirtschaftsprüfung und Steuerberatung GmbH & Co KG, handling potential newlines.

rules.description: Matches Universität St. Gallen with flexible spacing and optional 'in'.

rules.description: Matches Verwaltungsgerichtshofes (VwGH) as a single entity.

rules.name: Specific_Org_Imre_Schaffer
rules.description: Matches Imre & Schaffer Rechtsanwälte OG specifically.

rules.name: Specific_Org_Talwerk_Logistik
rules.description: Matches Talwerk Logistik Holding GMBH specifically to prevent truncation by general GmbH rule.

rules.name: Specific_Org_KonservatoriumStadtWien
rules.description: Matches Konservatorium der Stadt Wien specifically.

rules.name: Specific_Org_BKSSteuerberatung
rules.description: Matches BKS Steuerberatung GmbH & Co KG specifically.

rules.name: Specific_Org_OBUG_Nikolaus
rules.description: Matches the specific long organization name including quotes and hyphenated description.

rules.name: Specific_Org_MerkurTreuhand
rules.description: Matches Merkur Treuhand Steuerberatung GmbH with flexible whitespace to handle line breaks.

rules.name: Specific_Org_MerkurTreuhand_NoGmbH
rules.description: Matches Merkur Treuhand Steuerberatung without GmbH suffix (for cases where GmbH is missing or split).

rules.name: Org_FA_Location
rules.description: Matches Finanzamt abbreviations (FA) followed by location names (e.g., FA Spittal Villach, FA Salzburg-Stadt, FA Landeck Reutte).
